title: Myerson's Optimal Auction Design Framework
description: A flowchart illustrating the logical progression of Myerson's theory for designing revenue-maximizing auctions under asymmetric information.
elements: Allocation Rule (Assign to highest virtual valuation)
relationships: Valuations are transformed into Virtual Valuations
Virtual valuations determine the Allocation Rule
The Payment Rule is derived from the Allocation Rule
The Revenue Equivalence Principle justifies the design
The process leads to an Optimal Auction Outcome
